objects.name: Analytic 1710
objects.description: Defender observes an app (package/UID) repeatedly querying device networking context APIs (Wi-Fi scan results/current SSID/BSSID, Bluetooth device discovery, or cellular tower lists) at a rate or timing inconsistent with the app’s normal UX, often while backgrounded. Correlate API calls with permission usage (fine location, nearby devices/Bluetooth) and concurrent connectivity probes (DNS lookups/ARP/port reachability) to distinguish automated discovery from user-initiated settings checks. The detection is based on observed API execution + permission use + rate/sequence, not the specific API method name.

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: android:appops
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION|NEARBY_DEVICES|BLUETOOTH_SCAN used in close proximity to network-context queries

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: android:logcat
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: wifiservice startScan / scanResults retrieved repeatedly or by unexpected package

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: android:logcat
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: bluetoothmanager startDiscovery / getBondedDevices / scan callback bursts by package

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: android:logcat
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: telephony cell info enumeration bursts (neighboring/all cell info) by package

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: NSM:Flow
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: burst of DNS queries/connection attempts to RFC1918 or local gateway immediately after scans

x_mitre_mutable_elements.description: Correlation window to link scan/enumeration API usage with subsequent probes (e.g., 30–300s).
Minimum number of scan/enumeration calls per window before flagging (e.g., ≥3 Wi-Fi scans / 5 min).
For Bluetooth/cell, minimum unique devices/towers observed per window (helps avoid single-device noise).
Require app to be backgrounded during discovery to suppress legitimate UI-driven network selection.
Packages expected to scan (system settings, Wi-Fi managers, MDM, enterprise connectivity tools).
If true, require AppOps noteOp for fine location/nearby devices to reduce false positives.
